description: This file defines the User entity class for the backend system, including fields like id, name, email, role, active status, createdAt, and updatedAt. It uses JPA annotations for ORM mapping and includes lifecycle callbacks to update timestamps.

classes.name: User
classes.description: Entity class mapping to the users table, representing application users with fields for personal info, role, status, and timestamps.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Lifecycle callback method to update the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is persisted.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Checks if the user is active.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the user was created.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp of the last update.
